text: OSINTdefender According to Iranian state news outlet Press TV, Iran has already started the process of reconstructing destroyed and damaged oil infrastructure, with a plan to reach 80% capacity in the next two months. Per Iran’s CEO of the National Iranian Oil Refining and Distribution Company, Mohammad Sadeq Azimifar, “Contractors have been mobilized, and restoration work is already in progress.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据伊朗国家新闻媒体 Press TV 报道，伊朗已开始重建被毁和受损的石油基础设施，计划在未来两个月内达到 80% 的产能。据伊朗国家石油炼化与分配公司首席执行官 Mohammad Sadeq Azimifar 表示：“承包商已动员起来，修复工作正在进行中。” 推文

text: 🇺🇸 A U.S. Air Force KC-135 tanker in the UK before returning to the United States. Dozens of patched impact holes are visible across the aircraft, reportedly from an Iranian strike on an airbase in Saudi Arabia. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 一架美国空军 KC-135 加油机在返回美国前停留在英国。飞机上可见数十个修补过的弹孔，据报道是伊朗袭击沙特阿拉伯一处空军基地所致。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ❗️ Trump admits he has no other cards left but bombing civilian infrastructure: “The only thing left really is their water, which would be very devastating to hit.” I would hate to do it, but it’s their water, their desalination plants, and their electric generating plants. “We could have them all down. And I mean down, like you couldn’t have electricity for ten years…” You’d probably never be able to build them again. “I think we pretty much maxed out, other than those few items.“
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ❗️ 特朗普承认他除了轰炸民用基础设施外已无牌可打：“唯一剩下的就是他们的水，如果打击水利设施将是毁灭性的。” 我不想这样做，但那是他们的水、他们的海水淡化厂和他们的发电厂。“我们可以让它们全部瘫痪。我的意思是瘫痪，就像十年内都没有电一样……” 你可能永远无法重建它们。“我认为除了那几项，我们基本上已经用尽了手段。”

text: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇧🇪 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇸🇾 The 32nd meeting of the Kurdistan National Congress Diplomatic Committee was held in Brussels, with representatives from 23 Kurdish parties and institutions. A moment of silence was observed for those who died in the struggle for freedom. KNK Executive Council representative Zubeir Aydar said the process initiated by Abdullah Öcalan has reached an important stage and needs a legal basis. “Iran is significantly weakened; we must prepare well,” he added. Co‑chair Ahmed Karamus called for a unified national structure for all Kurds, stating that Ankara’s policy remains based on hostility. “Strengthening the alliance between Kurds in eastern Kurdistan is very important,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇧🇪 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇸🇾 库尔德斯坦国民大会外交委员会第 32 次会议在布鲁塞尔举行，来自 23 个库尔德政党和机构的代表出席了会议。会议为在争取自由斗争中牺牲的人们默哀。库尔德斯坦国民大会执行委员会代表 Zubeir Aydar 表示，阿卜杜拉·奥贾兰发起的进程已达到重要阶段，需要法律依据。“伊朗已严重削弱；我们必须做好准备，”他补充道。联合主席 Ahmed Karamus 呼吁为所有库尔德人建立统一的民族结构，并指出安卡拉的政策仍然基于敌意。“加强东库尔德斯坦库尔德人之间的联盟非常重要，”他说。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 IRGC Navy (Announcement No. 59): Contrary to enemy claims, the Strait of Hormuz remains under full control and open to civilian vessels under regulations. Any military vessel approaching under any pretext will be deemed a ceasefire violation and dealt with harshly and decisively.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊斯兰革命卫队海军（第 59 号公告）：与敌人的说法相反，霍尔木兹海峡仍处于完全控制之下，并根据规定对民用船只开放。任何以任何借口接近的军用船只都将被视为违反停火协议，并将受到严厉和果断的处理。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The IRGC warned that they will consider any U.S. military vessel approaching the Strait of Hormuz a ceasefire violation. “The Navy of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps declares that contrary to the false claims of some enemy officials, the Strait of Hormuz is under intelligent control and management, open for the safe passage of non-military vessels under specific regulations, and any military vessels attempting to approach the Strait of Hormuz under any pretext or excuse will be considered a violation of the ceasefire and will be dealt with harshly and decisively.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊斯兰革命卫队警告称，他们将把任何接近霍尔木兹海峡的美国军用船只视为违反停火协议。“伊斯兰革命卫队海军声明，与某些敌方官员的虚假说法相反，霍尔木兹海峡处于智能控制和管理之下，根据特定规定对非军用船只的安全通行开放，任何以任何借口或理由试图接近霍尔木兹海峡的军用船只都将被视为违反停火协议，并将受到严厉和果断的处理。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Seyed Mohammad Marandi in Islamabad, where Iran–US negotiations collapsed, explains the reasons for the failure and warns a return to war is likely. He also notes US media is already airing threats against Iran’s leadership and delegation. Marandi is a Tehran University professor and former advisor to Iran’s nuclear negotiation team. (Recorded 12 April 2026)
text_zh: 🇮🇷 Seyed Mohammad Marandi 在伊斯兰堡（伊朗与美国谈判破裂之地）解释了失败的原因，并警告称很可能会重返战争。他还指出，美国媒体已经在播放针对伊朗领导层和代表团的威胁。Marandi 是德黑兰大学教授，也是伊朗核谈判团队的前顾问。（录制于 2026 年 4 月 12 日）

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios: A U.S. official lists the gaps between the U.S. and Iran after negotiations in Islamabad: Freezing uranium enrichment in Iran Removing the enriched uranium from the country Dismantling the main uranium enrichment facilities (which are anyway Russian) The scope of unfreezing Iranian funds The date when the Strait of Hormuz will fully reopen and the cancellation of passage fees A regional security agreement and cessation of funding for terrorist organizations They continued on to list the U.S.’s red lines in negotiations: Ending all uranium enrichment Dismantle all major nuclear enrichment facilities (which are mostly destroyed) Retrieve highly enriched uranium Accept a broader peace, security and de-escalation framework that includes regional allies End funding for terrorist proxies Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis Fully open the Strait of Hormuz, charging no tolls for passage One gap in the talks was the amount of Iranian frozen funds that will be released, per source with knowledge @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：一位美国官员列出了伊斯兰堡谈判后美伊之间的分歧：冻结伊朗的铀浓缩；将浓缩铀运出该国；拆除主要的铀浓缩设施（无论如何这些设施都是俄罗斯的）；解冻伊朗资金的范围；霍尔木兹海峡完全重新开放的日期以及取消通行费；一项区域安全协议和停止资助恐怖组织。他们继续列出了美国在谈判中的红线：结束所有铀浓缩；拆除所有主要的核浓缩设施（大部分已被摧毁）；收回高浓缩铀；接受一个更广泛的和平、安全和去升级框架，包括区域盟友；停止资助哈马斯、真主党和胡塞武装等恐怖代理人；完全开放霍尔木兹海峡，通行不收取任何费用。据知情人士透露，谈判的一个分歧在于将释放的伊朗被冻结资金的数额。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Israeli forces have targeted a alleged Hamas cell that posed a alleged threat to troops in the central Gaza Strip. The strike killed a alleged Hamas member who allegedly took part in the capture of Hersh Goldberg‑Polin, Alon Ohel, Eliya Cohen and Or Levi from the Re’im shelter. Additional fighters who held Avinatan Or were also eliminated. The IDF has released a photo of Muhammad Fuad Ghaser Sayid, a Hamas platoon commander, documented holding Avinatan Or inside a alleged Hamas tunnel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列军队针对加沙地带中部一个据称对部队构成威胁的哈马斯小组进行了打击。这次袭击击毙了一名据称参与从雷伊姆避难所抓捕 Hersh Goldberg‑Polin、Alon Ohel、Eliya Cohen 和 Or Levi 的哈马斯成员。扣押 Avinatan Or 的其他武装人员也被消灭。以色列国防军发布了一张哈马斯排长 Muhammad Fuad Ghaser Sayid 的照片，记录了他将 Avinatan Or 扣押在据称是哈马斯隧道内的情景。 @wfwitness

text: Key sticking points in US–Iran talks: Stopping uranium enrichment Removing enriched uranium from Iran Dismantling key nuclear facilities Deciding how much Iranian money will be unfrozen Reopening the Strait of Hormuz (ending fees) A regional security deal, including ending support for groups Source: Axios
text_zh: 美伊谈判的关键症结：停止铀浓缩；将浓缩铀运出伊朗；拆除关键核设施；决定解冻多少伊朗资金；重新开放霍尔木兹海峡（取消收费）；一项区域安全协议，包括停止对相关组织的支持。来源：Axios

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: A major oil trading loss has emerged amid the Iran war, with one of the world’s top traders suffering hundreds of millions of dollars in setbacks after betting incorrectly on market movements. A team led by a senior trader at Vitoil made large derivatives bets that assumed tensions would ease and prices would move in a certain direction. Instead, the war escalated and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz caused markets to swing sharply the opposite way. The losses ran into several hundred million dollars, though part of the losses has since been recovered and the firm remains profitable overall. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ：在伊朗战争期间出现了一笔重大的石油交易损失，全球顶级交易商之一因对市场走势押注错误而遭受了数亿美元的挫折。由维多能源（Vitol）的一位高级交易员领导的团队进行了大规模的衍生品押注，假设紧张局势会缓解，价格会向特定方向移动。然而，战争升级，霍尔木兹海峡的关闭导致市场向相反方向剧烈波动。损失达到数亿美元，尽管部分损失此后已收回，但该公司总体上仍保持盈利。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel 19 rocket and drone attacks launched by Hezbollah since this morning, estimating over 50, mostly unguided fire from Lebanon targeting civilian communities in northern Israel. At this pace, the IDF may not hold back from striking Hezbollah targets in Beirut. Waiting for a disaster to happen is a big risk to take. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：自今天早上以来，真主党已发动了 19 次火箭弹和无人机袭击，估计超过 50 次，大部分是从黎巴嫩发射的非制导火力，目标是以色列北部平民社区。照此速度，以色列国防军可能不会再克制对贝鲁特真主党目标的打击。等待灾难发生是一个巨大的风险。推文

text: WarTranslated DeepState reports Russian forces advanced in Kharkiv and Donetsk regions near Veterinarne, Petropavlivka and Ivanopillia. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043362184479088862/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：DeepState 报告称，俄罗斯军队在哈尔科夫和顿涅茨克地区的 Veterinarne、Petropavlivka 和 Ivanopillia 附近取得了进展。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043362184479088862/photo/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @BarakRavid : A U.S. official details the main gaps in the talks with Iran: ☢️ Ending all uranium enrichment ☢️ Dismantle all major nuclear enrichment facilities (which are mostly destroyed) ☢️ Retrieve highly enriched uranium 📄 Accept a broader peace, security and de-escalation framework that includes regional allies 💰 End funding for terrorist proxies Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis 🚢 Fully open the Strait of Hormuz, charging no tolls for passage 💰 Another gap was the amount of Iranian frozen funds that will be released tweet
text_zh: ELINT News：转发 @BarakRavid：一位美国官员详细说明了与伊朗谈判的主要分歧：☢️ 结束所有铀浓缩 ☢️ 拆除所有主要的核浓缩设施（大部分已被摧毁） ☢️ 收回高浓缩铀 📄 接受一个更广泛的和平、安全和去升级框架，包括区域盟友 💰 停止资助恐怖代理人哈马斯、真主党和胡塞武装 🚢 完全开放霍尔木兹海峡，通行不收取任何费用 💰 另一个分歧是释放的伊朗被冻结资金的数额。推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli Ambassador to UN Danny Danon: I was not surprised because I deal with the Iranians at the UN for years, and I see their attitude. They feel superior, superior to the U.S., to the Gulf countries, to Israel. You cannot fool President Trump https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043360958572089637/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列驻联合国大使 Danny Danon：我并不感到惊讶，因为我与伊朗人在联合国打交道多年，我了解他们的态度。他们感到优越，优于美国，优于海湾国家，优于以色列。你无法愚弄特朗普总统。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043360958572089637/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW: i24News reports that Prime Minister Netanyahu and IDF Chief of Staff Zamir held a joint situational assessment today in an IDF-controlled area in southern Lebanon. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：最新消息：i24News 报道称，内塔尼亚胡总理和以色列国防军参谋长 Zamir 今天在黎巴嫩南部一个由以色列国防军控制的地区进行了联合局势评估。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to the United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) Centre, a sailing vessel 54nm southwest of Al-Hodeidah, Yemen was approached by a skiff with roughly a dozen people aboard, ~4 of which were armed. After the skiff pulled alongside the vessel and requested they stop the sailing vessel’s master fired a flare at the skiff causing them to break off. Given the nature of the encounter, it’s yet unlikely that this encounter involved Houthi actors. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据英国海上贸易行动中心（UKMTO）称，也门荷台达西南 54 海里处的一艘帆船被一艘载有约十几人的小艇接近，其中约 4 人携带武器。在小艇靠拢并要求帆船停下后，帆船船长向小艇发射了一枚信号弹，导致他们撤离。鉴于遭遇的性质，目前尚不清楚这次遭遇是否涉及胡塞武装人员。推文

text: Open Source Intel REPORT: The CIA used Israeli Pegasus spyware in a deception operation during efforts to rescue a downed U.S. airman in Iran, sending fake messages to Iranian officials and IRGC operatives claiming the pilot had already been recovered. - Times of Israel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：报道：中央情报局在营救一名在伊朗坠机的美国飞行员的努力中，利用以色列的飞马（Pegasus）间谍软件进行了一次欺骗行动，向伊朗官员和伊斯兰革命卫队特工发送虚假信息，声称飞行员已被救回。 - 以色列时报 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump on reports China is preparing to ship weapons to Iran: "I doubt they would do that... but if we catch them doing that, they get a 50% tariff, which is a staggering amount." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043357802375020964/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：特朗普就有关中国准备向伊朗运送武器的报道表示：“我怀疑他们会这样做……但如果我们抓到他们这样做，他们将面临 50% 的关税，这是一个惊人的数额。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043357802375020964/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: Chinese cars are destroying Europe because they are taking away business from Mercedes and BMW. We don’t have any Chinese cars in our country. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043357424002699404/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：特朗普总统：中国汽车正在摧毁欧洲，因为它们抢走了梅赛德斯和宝马的生意。我们国家没有任何中国汽车。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043357424002699404/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Saudi Arabia summoned Iraq's ambassador over "threats targeting the Kingdom via drones launched from Iraqi territory." - Saudi Foreign Ministry tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：沙特阿拉伯就“通过从伊拉克领土发射的无人机针对王国的威胁”召见了伊拉克大使。 - 沙特外交部 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Battle-damaged USAF KC-135 tanker returning from the Middle East sporting a number of patched shrapnel holes. Likely one of the tankers damaged in an Iranian missile/drone attack on Prince Sultan Airbase. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043355074244583688/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：一架在战斗中受损的美国空军 KC-135 加油机从中东返回，机身上有许多修补过的弹片孔。很可能是伊朗导弹/无人机袭击苏丹亲王空军基地时受损的加油机之一。 https://twitter.com/OSINTtechnical/status/2043355074244583688/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : In an extremely notable announcement, U.S. President Donald J. Trump has said that U.S. naval vessels will begin the process of blockading the Strait of Hormuz and that any vessel that pays a toll to Iran for transit will be interdicted by the U.S. Navy. Additionally, President Trump was extremely critical of the Iranian negotiators as well. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：转发 @sentdefender：在一项极其引人注目的声明中，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普表示，美国海军舰艇将开始封锁霍尔木兹海峡，任何向伊朗支付过路费的船只都将被美国海军拦截。此外，特朗普总统还对伊朗谈判代表进行了严厉批评。推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from 🇮🇪 Chay Bowes, The Irishman in Russia 🇷🇺: 🚨 I'm in Hungary for the election, its last chance saloon for common sense 🚨 So we take a look at the increasing lack of it across the World. Big Viktor is basically preventing WW3 here in Europe, but that doesn't stop Lindsey and Co trying to start it. Enjoy.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 🇮🇪 Chay Bowes, The Irishman in Russia 🇷🇺：🚨 我在匈牙利参加选举，这是常识的最后机会 🚨 所以我们来看看世界各地日益缺乏常识的现象。伟大的维克多基本上是在这里阻止欧洲的第三次世界大战，但这并不能阻止林赛等人试图发动战争。享受吧。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: A new report indicates that while the U.S. has severely degraded Iran’s conventional navy, Tehran still retains effective control over the Strait of Hormuz through a separate force. U.S. strikes destroyed a large portion of Iran’s regular navy, including major warships and vessels. However, the naval arm of the IRGC remains largely intact and continues to dominate the strategic waterway using small, fast-attack boats, drones, and sea mines. This force specialises in asymmetric warfare, allowing Iran to harass and restrict commercial shipping despite heavy military losses. Many of these smaller vessels are harder to target and are reportedly hidden along the coastline. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ：一份新报告显示，尽管美国严重削弱了伊朗的常规海军，但德黑兰仍通过另一支部队保持着对霍尔木兹海峡的有效控制。美国的打击摧毁了伊朗正规海军的大部分，包括主要军舰和船只。然而，伊斯兰革命卫队的海军力量基本完好无损，并继续使用小型快速攻击艇、无人机和水雷控制着这条战略水道。这支部队擅长非对称作战，使伊朗能够在遭受重大军事损失的情况下骚扰和限制商业航运。许多这些小型船只更难被瞄准，据报道隐藏在海岸线沿线。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区纳哈里亚及周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 Saudi Arabia has summoned the Iraqi ambassador in Riyadh Safia Taleb Al Souhail over continued drone attacks originating from Iraqi territory targeting the kingdom and other Gulf states. A formal diplomatic protest note was handed over. The kingdom stressed that Iraq must act responsibly, and that Saudi Arabia will take all necessary measures to defend its security. The move marks the first Saudi acknowledgement that it has been attacked by pro‑Iranian Iraqi militias, not only by Iran itself. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 沙特阿拉伯就源自伊拉克领土、针对王国和其他海湾国家的持续无人机袭击，召见了伊拉克驻利雅得大使 Safia Taleb Al Souhail。一份正式的外交抗议照会已被递交。王国强调，伊拉克必须采取负责任的行动，沙特阿拉伯将采取一切必要措施捍卫其安全。此举标志着沙特首次承认其不仅受到伊朗本身的攻击，还受到亲伊朗的伊拉克民兵的攻击。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Times : The CIA used the Israeli Pegasus spyware in a deception operation inside Iran during an attempt to rescue a downed American pilot. The pilot’s F-15E was shot down by an Iranian shoulder-fired missile. As part of the effort, the CIA allegedly used the Israeli-made software to send fake messages to Iranian leadership and IRGC operatives, claiming the missing officer had already been located. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Times：中央情报局在营救一名坠机的美国飞行员的尝试中，在伊朗境内利用以色列的飞马（Pegasus）间谍软件进行了一次欺骗行动。飞行员的 F-15E 被伊朗肩扛式导弹击落。作为努力的一部分，中情局据称利用这种以色列制造的软件向伊朗领导层和伊斯兰革命卫队特工发送虚假信息，声称失踪的军官已被找到。 @wfwitness

text: Chairman of Knesset National Security Committee Tzvika Foghel mocks Trump: Donald, if you have to shoot, shoot. Don’t quack 🦆
text_zh: 以色列议会国家安全委员会主席 Tzvika Foghel 嘲笑特朗普：唐纳德，如果你必须开枪，就开枪。别只会呱呱叫 🦆

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇱🇧 The Lebanese National News Agency reported fierce clashes the Israeli military and Hezbollah in the southern town of Bint Jbeil, earlier today. The IDF has encircled the town in recent days to clear it of alleged Hezbollah members. Israeli troops…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, Defence Minister Katz and the IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir held a security situation assessment inside Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇱🇧 黎巴嫩国家通讯社报道称，今天早些时候，以色列军队与真主党在南部城镇宾特朱拜勒发生激烈冲突。以色列国防军最近几天包围了该镇，以清除据称的真主党成员。以色列军队……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡、国防部长卡茨和以色列国防军参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔在黎巴嫩境内进行了安全局势评估。 @wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 A map by DroneBomber shows Russian air defense activity against Ukrainian drones in March. 🔴 It includes over 1,000 marked points. 🔴 The map covers only the territory of the Russian Federation within its internationally recognized borders. ➕ 📍 Moscow region: recorded air defense activity throughout March. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 DroneBomber 制作的一张地图显示了 3 月份俄罗斯防空部队针对乌克兰无人机的活动。 🔴 它包括 1,000 多个标记点。 🔴 该地图仅涵盖俄罗斯联邦在其国际公认边界内的领土。 ➕ 📍 莫斯科地区：记录了整个 3 月份的防空活动。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah has fired some 20 rockets from Lebanon at northern Israel today, according to the IDF. The rockets were either intercepted or struck open areas, and there have been no reports of injuries. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据以色列国防军称，真主党今天从黎巴嫩向以色列北部发射了约 20 枚火箭弹。火箭弹要么被拦截，要么击中了开阔地带，目前没有人员伤亡报告。推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: As Bibi Netanyahu said, we're the big brother and they're the small brother. It's been a very effective team. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043350860307034344/video/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s president, in a call with his Putin, says Tehran is ready for a “balanced and fair” agreement that ensures long-term peace and security. (Note: The call likely took place before President Trump’s blockade announcement.) https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043350604504846515/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗总统在与普京通话时表示，德黑兰已准备好达成一项“平衡且公平”的协议，以确保长期的和平与安全。（注：通话很可能发生在特朗普总统宣布封锁之前。） https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043350604504846515/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区基里亚特什莫纳及周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Tehran's Judiciary: Assets of Iran International General Manager Seized 34 valuable assets belonging to Mahmoud Enayat , General Manager of the Mossad-linked propaganda news network Iran International. The seized properties include plots of land, several farms, houses, apartments, garden plots, one factory, and more. These were identified through precise intelligence monitoring and blocked under laws against espionage and cooperation with the Zionist regime and hostile countries.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 德黑兰司法机构：伊朗国际电视台总经理资产被查封。属于与摩萨德有关联的宣传新闻网络“伊朗国际”总经理 Mahmoud Enayat 的 34 项贵重资产被查封。被查封的财产包括土地、几处农场、房屋、公寓、花园地块、一家工厂等。这些资产是通过精确的情报监控确定的，并根据反间谍和与犹太复国主义政权及敌对国家合作的法律被冻结。

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Hezbollah releases footage of a strike drone targeting Israeli occupation soldiers positioned in the town of Taybeh, southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 真主党发布了一段打击无人机袭击驻扎在黎巴嫩南部泰贝镇的以色列占领军士兵的视频。

text: 🇮🇷 IRGC Navy in first reaction to Trump's statements following collapse of Islamabad talks: "Any wrong step in the Strait of Hormuz will put the enemy in deadly whirlpools." An American destroyer left the Strait after receiving a warning from the Iranian Navy. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊斯兰革命卫队海军对特朗普在伊斯兰堡谈判破裂后的声明做出首次回应：“在霍尔木兹海峡的任何错误举动都将使敌人陷入致命的漩涡。” 一艘美国驱逐舰在收到伊朗海军警告后离开了海峡。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The occupation is broadcasting footage of ongoing clashes with Hezbollah fighters in Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 占领军正在播放与黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒真主党武装人员持续冲突的视频。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ $1.5 Trillion for Bombs while America’s needs go unmet
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 1.5 万亿美元用于炸弹，而美国的需求却得不到满足

text: 🇮🇷 A source close to the negotiation team: The interview attributed to Araghchi, the Foreign Minister, about the negotiations, which has been circulating since this morning on some Persian and English social networks, is completely fabricated and he has not given any interview to the media.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 一位接近谈判团队的消息人士：今天早上在一些波斯语和英语社交网络上流传的关于谈判的、归因于外交部长阿拉格希的采访完全是捏造的，他没有接受任何媒体的采访。
